title: Community contribution workflow under the same dual-gate + audit
context: OER are abundant and free but are not indexed against the curriculum standards that govern what teachers must teach, so teachers cannot find the free resource aligned to a given standard. This project builds an open crosswalk of educator-reviewed AlignmentRecords linking OER to standards by stable identifier (CASE GUID / ASN URI), not by reproducing copyrighted standards text. Two hard gates never skip: the dual licence/terms gate (gate-002) and educator review of every record, with a blind second-reviewer precision audit holding precision at >= 95%. Scaling beyond the core team without lowering precision: external contributions pass the same dual gate, educator review and sampled audit.
objective: Author the community contribution workflow that holds external contributions to the same dual-gate + educator review + audit.
acceptanceCriteria: Documents a workflow where external contributors submit candidate alignments that pass the same dual licence/terms gate (gate-002) + educator review + sampled precision audit before shipping.
No contribution bypasses the gates or lowers precision below 95%; reviewer/auditor independence preserved.
Defines provenance and DCO requirements for contributors.
Output licensed CC-BY-4.0; the commit is DCO signed-off.
